dashboard.title: Global Dashboard
dashboard.no_guilds: The bot is on no servers or not ready yet.

settings.title: Global Bot Settings
settings.presence_hint: Status and activity are applied immediately after saving and restored on the next start.
settings.avatar_hint: The bot automatically switches its avatar randomly every {{interval}}. Place images in assets/avatars/ (PNG, JPG, GIF, WEBP). This setting applies bot-wide for all servers.
settings.fo76_enabled_hint: When active, codes are automatically fetched weekly and posted in all configured channels.
settings.fo76_weekday_hint: Codes are fetched once a week on this day from nukacrypt.com.
settings.fo76_fetch_hint: Fetch codes immediately from nukacrypt.com — regardless of the configured weekday.

flash.fo76_fetch_ok: Fallout 76 codes fetched and posted successfully.
flash.notifier_not_found: Notifier “{{name}}” not found or not changeable.

dsgvo.title: GDPR / Data Management
dsgvo.subtitle: Export or delete guild- and user-related data from the database.
dsgvo.info: Note: The export contains all data stored in the database for the selected guild or user as a JSON file. Deletion removes all related entries permanently.

guild.title: Guild Data
guild.desc: Export or delete all data for a specific Discord guild (infractions, levels, tickets, giveaways, etc.).
guild.confirm_delete: Permanently delete all data for this guild?

user.title: User Data
user.desc: Export or delete all personal data for a Discord user across all guilds.
user.id_hint: The numeric Discord ID of the user (17–20 digits).
user.confirm_delete: Permanently delete all data for this user?

flash.guild_deleted: All data for guild {{id}} has been deleted.
flash.user_deleted: All data for user {{id}} has been deleted.

common.deploy_fail: Deploy failed — commands saved but not registered.

stats.title: Server Statistics
stats.subtitle: Data is collected from the first bot start. All times are in UTC.

settings.title: Settings

placeholder.not_implemented: This settings page is not yet implemented.

settings.subtitle: Select a module to edit the bot configuration.

prefix.title: Bot Prefix
prefix.description: Prefix for text message commands (e.g. ! → !ping). Leave empty to disable prefix commands.
prefix.label: Prefix

language.title: Bot Language
language.description: Language of the bot for this server (commands, responses, embeds).
language.label: Bot Language

moderation.title: Moderation
moderation.log_channel_desc: All moderation actions (Warn, Kick, Ban, Timeout) are logged to this channel.
moderation.excluded_roles_desc: Members with these roles are exempt from auto-moderation.
moderation.badwords_placeholder: One word per line or comma-separated
moderation.thresholds_desc: When a user reaches a certain number of warnings, an action is automatically taken.
moderation.auditlog_settings_desc: All enabled events will be sent to this channel. Choose no channel to disable audit logging.
moderation.auditlog_ignore_bots: Do not log actions performed by bots
moderation.ignored_desc: Messages updated or deleted in these channels will not be logged.

reactionroles.title: Reaction Roles
reactionroles.empty: No panels yet. Create one using "New Panel".
reactionroles.entries_click_hint: Click the emote icon to select a server emote.

commands.title: Custom Commands
commands.register_confirm: Register commands with Discord now? This will overwrite all existing slash commands.
commands.prefix_hint: Prefix is configured under General. Parameters are passed as arguments.
commands.grant_roles_desc: These roles will be granted to the user when they run the command.
commands.revoke_roles_desc: These roles will be removed from the user when they run the command.

begruessung.title: Welcome
begruessung.welcome_channel_desc: Sends a public message when a new member joins.
begruessung.welcome_dm_desc: Sends the new member a direct private message.
begruessung.goodbye_channel_desc: Sends a message when a member leaves the server.
begruessung.dm_hint: If the user has DMs disabled the message will be silently skipped.

starboard.title: Starboard
starboard.channel_desc: Highlighted messages will be posted in this channel.
starboard.ignored_channels_desc: Messages from these channels will not appear on the starboard.

slowmode.title: Slow-Mode Manager
slowmode.enable_desc: When too many messages are sent in a channel within the time window, slowmode is automatically applied. It is lifted once the channel calms down.
slowmode.channel_rules_desc: Per channel: Threshold = messages in the time window (seconds) that triggers slowmode. Slowmode duration in seconds (0 = disabled).

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.quote: "I watch over your server so your community experiences the best. Tell me what you need — I'll handle the rest."

invites.title: Invite Tracking
invites.desc: Rankings & invite codes at a glance

guild_select.title: Select Server
guild_select.subtitle: Choose the server you want to manage.

birthday.title: Birthdays
birthday.desc: Track birthdays, assign roles and send announcements

fallout76.title: Fallout 76
fallout76.desc: Automatically fetch weekly Nuclear Codes (Alpha, Bravo, Charlie)

zkillboard.title: EVE Online – zKillboard
zkillboard.desc: Receive killmails in real time from zkillboard.com and post them to Discord

giveaways.title: Giveaways
giveaways.desc: Start, manage and automatically end giveaways

leveling.title: Leveling
leveling.desc: XP system, level-up messages, role rewards & leaderboard

invites.title: Invite Tracking
invites.desc: Track who invited how many members — leaderboard & invite codes

birthday.role_desc: This role is automatically assigned on the birthday and removed afterwards.
birthday.announce_desc: Sends a message when someone has a birthday. Placeholders: {user} {username} {server}
birthday.time_hint: Announcements are sent once per day starting at this time.
birthday.cmd_hint: Empty = anyone can use this command

fallout76.channel_desc: Choose a channel where the Nuclear Codes will be posted automatically. If no channel is selected, no codes will be posted for this server.

giveaways.intro: Start giveaways with /giveaway start directly in Discord. Here you can see an overview and end active giveaways early.
giveaways.algo_desc: The bot collects all 🎉 reactions on the giveaway message, filters out bot accounts, and picks winners using a random shuffle (Fisher-Yates). Every participant has an equal chance — reacting multiple times does not count.

zkillboard.how_desc: The bot receives new killmails from zkillboard.com in real time and posts them to the configured channel. Without entity IDs, all kills above the ISK minimum are posted. With entity IDs (character, corporation or alliance ID), only kills involving these entities are filtered.
zkillboard.entity_find_desc: Open the desired entity on zkillboard.com — the ID is in the URL: zkillboard.com/corporation/98765432/
zkillboard.entity_hint_add: Character, corporation or alliance IDs, comma-separated. Empty = all kills are posted.
zkillboard.entity_hint_edit: Character, corporation or alliance IDs, comma-separated.
zkillboard.match_hint: Only relevant when entity IDs are entered.

tempchannels.title: Temp Channels
tempchannels.desc: Members create their own temporary voice channels with one click

reminder.title: Reminder
reminder.desc: Daily DM reminders — settings & overview of all entries

leveling.title: Leveling
leveling.desc: XP system, level-up messages, role rewards & leaderboard

music.title: Music
music.desc: Play Spotify — configure DJ role, volume and queue

tickets.title: Ticket System
tickets.desc: Manage support tickets — categories, roles, open tickets

scheduled.title: Scheduled Messages
scheduled.desc: Send scheduled text or embed messages to any channel

tempchannels.how_it_works_desc: Choose a voice channel as a trigger. As soon as a member joins this channel, the bot automatically creates a new private voice channel and moves the member there. The channel is automatically deleted once it is empty.
tempchannels.trigger_hint: When a member joins this channel, a temporary channel will be created.
tempchannels.category_hint: Temporary channels will be created in this category.
tempchannels.keepalive_desc: Duration in minutes before the temporary channel is deleted after all members have left. 0 = delete immediately · ∞ = never delete.
tempchannels.ownerlock_desc: Duration in minutes before the channel is released for takeover after the owner has left. 0 = release immediately · ∞ = never release (no /voice-claim possible).
tempchannels.role_restrict_hint: Empty = anyone can use the trigger channel

invites.title: Invite Tracking
invites.xp_hint: 0 = disabled. The inviter gets XP when someone joins.
invites.leveling_disabled: Leveling is disabled — enable it under Leveling to grant XP per invite.
invites.leaderboard_hint: Members can create their personal link with /invite create.

leveling.info_desc: Users receive a random amount of XP per message between XP-Min and XP-Max with a configurable cooldown. Levels are calculated by the formula: Level N requires 5·N²+50·N+100 XP.
leveling.cooldown_hint: Seconds between XP grants per user
leveling.stack_hint: Off = user keeps only the role of the current level
leveling.mult_desc: Users with this role receive a multiplied XP amount. When multiple roles match, the highest multiplier applies.
leveling.import_desc: Reads the message history of a channel and grants XP retroactively based on the number of messages per user. Bot messages are ignored. XP is added on top of existing XP — use this feature only once per channel.

music.enabled_desc: Unlock all music commands on this server
music.volume_hint: Volume at the start of a new queue (1–150)
music.queue_hint: Maximum number of songs in the queue
music.dj_hint: Only members with this role can use music commands
music.response_hint: Bot only responds to music commands in this channel
music.spotify_active: Active — Spotify URLs and playlists are supported
music.spotify_inactive: Inactive — add SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ID and SPOTIFY_CLIENT_SECRET to the .env file

reminder.enabled_hint: When disabled, no reminders can be set and active ones will not be sent.
reminder.add_restrict_hint: Empty = anyone can use the reminder
reminder.all_restrict_hint: Empty = anyone can view all entries

tickets.support_role_hint: This role can see all ticket channels.
tickets.list_restrict_hint: Empty = anyone can view all tickets

flash.past_date: The date must be in the future.
flash.no_content: Text or embed content is required.

bugtracker.title: Bug Tracker
bugtracker.enabled_hint: When disabled, no more bugs can be reported via /bug.
bugtracker.list_hint: Empty = everyone may view the list

flash.channel_not_text: Channel not found or not a text channel.
flash.import_done: Import complete: {{scanned}} messages from {{users}} users in #{{channel}} — {{xpp}} XP per message.

social.title: Social Notifications
social.subtitle: Monitor platforms and automatically notify your community.

twitch.title: Twitch
twitch.desc: Live notifications and automatic live role for streamers

x.title: X (Twitter)
x.desc: Monitor new posts and automatically post them to Discord

youtube.title: YouTube
youtube.desc: Monitor new videos and automatically post them to Discord

social.message_default_hint: Empty = default text will be used.

twitch.api_warning_desc: Add TWITCH_CLIENT_ID and TWITCH_CLIENT_SECRET to your .env file. Get the credentials from the Twitch Developer Portal under Applications → Manage.
twitch.live_role_hint: The role is automatically assigned when a member streams on Twitch and has linked their account under Discord Settings → Connections.
twitch.ph_streamer: Display name of the streamer on Twitch
twitch.ph_link: Direct link to the Twitch channel

kick.ph_streamer: Display name of the streamer on Kick
kick.ph_link: Direct link to the Kick channel
kick.ph_example: 🟢 {streamer} is live on Kick! Check it out: {link}

x.api_warning_desc: Add GETXAPI_KEY to your .env file. Get the token at https://www.getxapi.com/ – Get API Key → API Keys → + Create Key.

youtube.channelid_hint: Starts with UC, 24 characters. Found under Channel page → About → Channel ID.
youtube.label_hint: Used in the message text as {channel}.
youtube.find_id: Where do I find the Channel ID?
youtube.find_id_desc:
On the YouTube channel page: About → Share channel → Copy channel ID.
Alternatively: youtube.com/channel/UCxxxxxx — the part after /channel/.

flash.twitch_required: Twitch login and channel are required.
flash.x_required: X username and channel are required.
flash.youtube_required: Channel ID and notification channel are required.
flash.kick_required: Kick channel name and channel are required.
flash.trovo_required: Trovo channel name and Discord channel are required.

trovo.api_warning_desc: Add TROVO_CLIENT_ID to your .env file. Get the Client-ID at developer.trovo.live after registering an app.
trovo.ph_streamer: Display name of the streamer on Trovo
trovo.ph_link: Direct link to the Trovo channel
trovo.ph_example: 🟣 {streamer} is live on Trovo! Check it out: {link}

kofi.title: Ko-Fi
kofi.desc: Supporter notifications, webhook URL and role assignment

patreon.title: Patreon
patreon.desc: Link membership tiers to Discord roles

kofi.webhook_desc: Enter this URL in your Ko-Fi Dashboard under Webhooks.
kofi.token_desc: Found in the Ko-Fi Dashboard under Webhooks → Advanced. Used to verify each incoming request.
kofi.channel_desc: A message will be posted in this channel when someone supports via Ko-Fi.
kofi.role_desc: This role is automatically assigned when the Ko-Fi name matches a Discord member. If no matching member is found, a note will appear in the notification.
kofi.tier_desc: Assign custom Discord roles to membership tiers. The tier name must exactly match the name in the Ko-Fi Dashboard. If no matching tier is found, the fallback role above is used.
kofi.embed_desc: The embed title is automatically set from the type (e.g. ☕ Donation). Here you configure the description line below it.
kofi.forward_desc: Incoming Ko-Fi webhooks will additionally be forwarded to these URLs — one URL per line. Forwarding happens in the background and does not affect processing.

patreon.connect_desc: Connect your Patreon creator account to automatically assign tier roles. After connecting, your tiers will be loaded automatically.
patreon.api_warning: PATREON_CLIENT_ID and PATREON_CLIENT_SECRET must be configured in the .env file.
patreon.webhook_desc: Enter the URL and secret in the Patreon Developer Portal under Webhooks. Triggers: members:pledge:create, members:pledge:update, members:pledge:delete.
patreon.secret_placeholder: Webhook secret from the Patreon portal
patreon.channel_desc: A message will be posted in this channel when someone becomes a Patron.
patreon.tier_desc: Assign a Discord role to each Patreon tier. The tier name is for display only — the mapping is done via the Tier ID from the Patreon webhook payload.
patreon.tier_auto_loaded: Tiers were automatically loaded from your campaign.
patreon.tier_id_hint: Find the tier ID in the Patreon webhook payload under data.relationships.currently_entitled_tiers.data[].id.

flash.command_name_invalid: Command name must start with a letter or number.
flash.rr_channel_not_found: Channel not found or not a text channel.

twitch.content:
📺 **Twitch Live Role**

The live role is automatically assigned as soon as you **stream on Twitch** — provided your Twitch account is linked in Discord.

**How to link your account:**
1. Open **Discord Settings**
2. Go to **Connections**
3. Click the **Twitch icon** and sign in

Once you go live, you'll receive the role automatically. It will be removed when your stream ends.

voice.not_in_channel: ❌ You are not in a temporary channel.
voice.not_owner: ❌ You are not the owner of this channel.
voice.banned: 🚫 **{{user}}** has been banned from the channel.
voice.owner_still_in: ❌ The current owner is still in the channel.
voice.locked_permanently: ❌ This channel is permanently locked and cannot be claimed.
voice.locked_remaining: ⏳ The channel is locked for another **{{time}}**.
voice.now_owner: 👑 You are now the owner of this channel.
voice.user_not_in: ❌ This user is not in your channel.
voice.kicked: 👢 **{{user}}** has been removed from the channel.
voice.locked: 🔒 Channel locked — no one can join anymore.
voice.unlocked: 🔓 Channel unlocked — everyone can join again.
voice.hidden: 🙈 Channel hidden — it is no longer visible to others.
voice.revealed: 👁️ Channel visible — everyone can see it again.
voice.unbanned: ✅ **{{user}}** has been unbanned from the channel.
voice.commands_embed_desc:
`/voice-ban [member]` — Ban a user from the voice channel
`/voice-unban [member]` — Unban a user
`/voice-kick [member]` — Kick a user from the channel
`/voice-lock` — Lock the channel (no one can join)
`/voice-unlock` — Unlock the channel
`/voice-hide` — Hide the channel
`/voice-reveal` — Make the channel visible again
`/voice-limit [user_limit]` — Change the user limit (0 = unlimited)
`/voice-rename [name]` — Rename the channel
`/voice-transfer [member]` — Transfer ownership
`/voice-claim` — Claim ownership (when owner is gone)
`/voice-owner` — Show the current owner
`/voice-clean` — Delete all empty temporary channels

music.dj_required: ❌ You need the DJ role for this command.
music.queue_no_more: ❌ The queue contains no more songs.
music.queue_empty_leave: ✅ Queue empty — bot is leaving the channel.

events.command_error: ❌ An error occurred while executing the command.

events.prefix_error: ❌ An error occurred while executing the command.

hero.subtitle: Moderation, Music, Leveling, Social Feeds and much more — all in one bot with an intuitive web dashboard.

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: Powerful features that truly advance your server
features.disclaimer: The previews shown use sample data to illustrate the features.

moderation.title: Powerful Moderation
moderation.desc: Keep your server clean with a full warn, ban and timeout system. Automatic escalation on repeated violations — you decide the thresholds.
items: Complete infractions history with case IDs

leveling.title: Leveling & XP System
leveling.desc: Motivate your community with a full XP system. Automatically reward active members with roles and celebrate level-ups in chat.
items: Level-up notifications in chat or via DM

music.title: Music for everyone
music.desc: Enjoy music directly in your voice channel. Support for YouTube, Spotify and SoundCloud with a full queue system and DJ role protection.

social.title: Social Notifications
social.desc: Never miss a new post or stream from your favourite creators. Nephthys sends automatic notifications for Twitch, YouTube, Kick and X (Twitter).
items: Twitch & Kick live alerts with stream info

modules.title: Feature Overview
modules.subtitle: From moderation to social media — Nephthys has something for every server

tempchannels.title: Temporary Voice Channels
tempchannels.desc: Automatically created voice channels that manage themselves. Owners can rename, lock, hide, kick users and more.

reactionroles.title: Reaction Roles
reactionroles.desc: Automatically assign roles via emoji reaction. Perfect for self-assignable roles, community colour selection and channel access.

birthday.title: Birthday System
birthday.desc: Automatically celebrate your community members' birthdays with personalised messages and an optional birthday role.

commands.title: Custom Commands
commands.desc: Create your own slash commands without any coding knowledge. Define parameters, responses and role restrictions directly in the dashboard.

kofi.title: Ko-Fi Integration
kofi.desc: Automatically reward your supporters with roles based on Ko-Fi tiers. With expiry dates, statistics and webhook support.

patreon.title: Patreon Integration
patreon.desc: Connect your Patreon campaign and automatically assign Discord roles based on membership tiers — with OAuth2 and real-time webhooks.

reminder.title: Reminder
reminder.desc: Set personal reminders directly in Discord. Up to 167 hours in the future — the bot pings you at the right time.

steam.title: Steam Integration
steam.desc: Keep your community informed about Steam games: prices, player counts, latest news and player profile statistics right in chat.

gaming.title: Gaming Integrations
gaming.desc: Made for gamers: Fallout 76 Nuclear Launch Codes and EVE Online zKillboard killmail alerts directly in your Discord server.

begruessung.title: Welcome System
begruessung.desc: Welcome new members with personalised messages in channel or via DM. Timed announcements and role restrictions included.

starboard.title: Starboard
starboard.desc: Automatically highlight your community's most popular messages in a dedicated channel — via a reaction threshold.

slowmode.title: Slow-Mode Manager
slowmode.desc: Automatically detects overloaded channels and activates slowmode — no manual intervention needed. Configurable per channel.

giveaways.title: Giveaways
giveaways.desc: Start giveaways with automatic winner selection, countdown timer and optional participation requirements via role filter.

tickets.title: Ticket System
tickets.desc: Support tickets directly in Discord — with categories, role assignments, automatic archive and clear dashboard management.

scheduled.title: Scheduled Messages
scheduled.desc: Schedule text or embed messages for a specific time — once or recurring. Perfect for announcements, events and regular updates.

trovo.title: Trovo
trovo.desc: Never miss a stream on Trovo. Nephthys automatically sends live notifications to your configured Discord channel as soon as a streamer goes online.

invites.title: Invite Tracking
invites.desc: Track who invited whom to the server. Leaderboard with invite counts, XP rewards for inviters and an overview of all registered invite codes.

dashboard_teaser.title: Everything under control — right in your browser
dashboard_teaser.desc: Configure every aspect of your bot via the clear web dashboard. No commands needed — just log in, select a server and get started.

cta.title: Ready to improve your server?
cta.subtitle: Add Nephthys to your Discord server today — free, ready to use immediately and fully configurable.
